_comments: Demo Application.AgentSettings for the Data Explorer app — exercises the app-level default-agent
resolution (DefaultAgentID) and the realtime co-agent's multi-agent delegation + disclosure
(RelevantAgents). Sage is the benign conversation-manager lead; it can delegate to Research Agent
(narrated handoff) and Database Research Agent (silent absorb). Only updates the AgentSettings field
on the existing Data Explorer Application row — nothing else.
